title: cynoglossum dubium
intro: Cynoglossum dubium, also known as the small-flowered hound's-tongue, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cynoglossum dubium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats, making it a valuable natural remedy for respiratory illnesses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds and flu.
